jcr:content.jcr:description: Form Options Dropdown — test fixtures with all states for GAAM-507 automation.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Form Options (Dropdown) — Test Fixtures

text_header.text:
Form Options (Dropdown) — Test Fixtures

Single-select and multi-select dropdown components across light and dark backgrounds. Covers all GAAM-507 states: Default, Filled, Disabled/Read Only, Required, Helper Text, Error, Open Panel, Selection Count. The existing style guide only covers radio and checkbox types — all dropdown content here is new.

dropdown_ss_white_default.helpMessage: Select one option from the list.
dropdown_ss_white_default.name: ss-white-default
dropdown_ss_white_default.jcr:title: Investment Type

dropdown_ss_white_filled.helpMessage: A selection has already been made.
dropdown_ss_white_filled.name: ss-white-filled
dropdown_ss_white_filled.jcr:title: Investment Type (Filled)

dropdown_ss_white_req.helpMessage: This field is required. Choose one that matches your profile.
dropdown_ss_white_req.name: ss-white-required
dropdown_ss_white_req.requiredMessage: Please select an investment type to continue.
dropdown_ss_white_req.jcr:title: Investment Type (Required)

dropdown_ss_white_err_default.name: ss-white-error-default
dropdown_ss_white_err_default.requiredMessage: You must select an investment type.
dropdown_ss_white_err_default.jcr:title: Investment Type (Error Default — submit to trigger)

dropdown_ss_white_err_filled.name: ss-white-error-filled
dropdown_ss_white_err_filled.requiredMessage: You must select an investment type.
dropdown_ss_white_err_filled.jcr:title: Investment Type (Error Filled — clear then submit)

dropdown_ss_slate_default.helpMessage: Select one option from the list.
dropdown_ss_slate_default.name: ss-slate-default
dropdown_ss_slate_default.jcr:title: Product Type

dropdown_ss_slate_filled.helpMessage: A selection has already been made.
dropdown_ss_slate_filled.name: ss-slate-filled
dropdown_ss_slate_filled.jcr:title: Product Type (Filled)

dropdown_ss_granite_filled.helpMessage: A region has already been selected.
dropdown_ss_granite_filled.name: ss-granite-filled
dropdown_ss_granite_filled.jcr:title: Region (Filled)

dropdown_ss_granite_req.helpMessage: Region is required for routing your inquiry.
dropdown_ss_granite_req.name: ss-granite-required
dropdown_ss_granite_req.jcr:title: Region (Required)

text_ms_white_header.text:
Multi-Select Dropdown — Light Mode (White Background)

Multi-select displays checkbox-style rows in the open panel and a count badge (e.g., "2 selected") on the closed trigger.

dropdown_ms_white_default.helpMessage: Select all product types that apply.
dropdown_ms_white_default.name: ms-white-default
dropdown_ms_white_default.jcr:title: Products of Interest

dropdown_ms_white_filled.helpMessage: 2 items have already been selected (count badge test).
dropdown_ms_white_filled.name: ms-white-filled
dropdown_ms_white_filled.jcr:title: Products of Interest (Filled — 2 selected)

dropdown_ms_white_req.helpMessage: Select at least one product you are interested in.
dropdown_ms_white_req.name: ms-white-required
dropdown_ms_white_req.requiredMessage: Please select at least one product.
dropdown_ms_white_req.jcr:title: Products of Interest (Required)

dropdown_ms_white_err.name: ms-white-error
dropdown_ms_white_err.requiredMessage: Please select at least one product of interest.
dropdown_ms_white_err.jcr:title: Products of Interest (Error — submit to trigger)

dropdown_ms_slate_err.name: ms-slate-error
dropdown_ms_slate_err.requiredMessage: Please select at least one topic.
dropdown_ms_slate_err.jcr:title: Topics of Interest (Error — submit to trigger)

dropdown_ms_granite_default.helpMessage: Choose one or more communication preferences.
dropdown_ms_granite_default.name: ms-granite-default
dropdown_ms_granite_default.jcr:title: Communication Preferences

dropdown_ms_granite_err.name: ms-granite-error
dropdown_ms_granite_err.requiredMessage: Please select at least one communication preference.
dropdown_ms_granite_err.jcr:title: Communication Preferences (Error — submit to trigger)

dropdown_ms_azul_req.helpMessage: You must select at least one investment goal.
dropdown_ms_azul_req.name: ms-azul-required
dropdown_ms_azul_req.requiredMessage: Please select at least one investment goal.
dropdown_ms_azul_req.jcr:title: Investment Goals (Required)

dropdown_ms_azul_err.name: ms-azul-error
dropdown_ms_azul_err.requiredMessage: Please select at least one investment goal.
dropdown_ms_azul_err.jcr:title: Investment Goals (Error — submit to trigger)
